nasb.text: but you shall freely open your hand to him, and shall generously lend him sufficient for his need in whatever he lacks.

esv.text: but you shall open your hand to him and lend him sufficient for his need, whatever it may be.

cnv.text: 你一定要向他伸手，照著他缺乏的借給他，補足他的缺乏。

ccb.text: 他们所需要的，你们要慷慨地借给他们。
